summary.en: Finch is an employment data platform with a unified API for HR and payroll systems.
summary.zh: Finch 是一個就業資料平台，提供統一 API 串接人資與薪資系統。

highlight.en: Finch gives developers compliant, secure access to previously closed payroll and HR systems, powering use cases across insurance, benefits, tax, and finance.
highlight.zh: Finch 讓開發者能以合規且安全的方式存取過去封閉的薪資與人資系統，支援保險、福利、稅務與財務等應用場景。

summary.en: Balance is a digital B2B payment experience company, billed as 'Stripe for B2B'.
summary.zh: Balance 是一家 B2B 數位支付體驗公司，被稱為「B2B 版的 Stripe」。

highlight.en: Balance offers a business checkout that lets buyers pay by check, card, or bank on net terms or payment plans, while sellers receive funds instantly.
highlight.zh: Balance 提供企業結帳功能，讓買方可用支票、信用卡或銀行轉帳並選擇月結帳期或分期付款，賣方則能即時收到款項。

summary.en: SiPhox Health builds wearable and at-home health monitoring using silicon photonic chips.
summary.zh: SiPhox Health 運用矽光子晶片打造穿戴式與居家健康監測產品。

highlight.en: SiPhox replaces a 100-pound optical instrument with a silicon chip smaller than a postage stamp, enabling a new class of consumer health wearables.
highlight.zh: SiPhox 以比郵票還小的矽晶片取代重達百磅的光學儀器，開創新一代消費級健康穿戴裝置。

summary.en: Todos Comemos scales the premade and ready-to-eat food industry across LATAM.
summary.zh: Todos Comemos 在拉丁美洲擴大預製與即食食品產業的規模。

highlight.en: Todos Comemos combines proprietary food tech, multichannel distribution for established brands, and a subscription service to bring premade meals to millions in LATAM.
highlight.zh: Todos Comemos 結合自有食品技術、為既有品牌提供的多通路配送，以及訂閱服務，將預製餐點帶給拉丁美洲數百萬人。

summary.en: Vitable Health offers affordable care for startups via ICHRA and bundled direct primary care.
summary.zh: Vitable Health 透過 ICHRA 與整合的直接基層醫療，為新創公司提供平價醫療方案。

highlight.en: Vitable lets startups offer ICHRA with built-in direct primary care, including free virtual visits, over 1,000 prescriptions, and 40+ lab tests, funded with tax-free dollars.
highlight.zh: Vitable 讓新創公司提供內建直接基層醫療的 ICHRA，包含免費視訊看診、逾 1,000 種處方藥與 40 多項檢驗，並以免稅金額支付。

summary.en: Decentro is an API platform for banking integrations in India and APAC, a 'Plaid for India'.
summary.zh: Decentro 是面向印度與亞太地區的銀行整合 API 平台，堪稱「印度版 Plaid」。

highlight.en: Decentro turns the typical five-month banking integration into a couple of weeks via a modular full-stack platform that handles ongoing fixes and updates without breaking flows.
highlight.zh: Decentro 以模組化的全端平台，將通常長達五個月的銀行整合縮短為數週，並在不中斷流程的情況下處理後續修正與更新。

summary.en: Ready builds collaborative software to help optimize regulated utilities.
summary.zh: Ready 打造協作軟體，協助優化受監管的公用事業。

highlight.en: Ready's Digital Infrastructure tools help utility stakeholders collaborate so more families get better utility services at lower cost.
highlight.zh: Ready 的數位基礎設施工具協助公用事業相關方協作，讓更多家庭以更低成本獲得更好的公用事業服務。

summary.en: Warmly is an autonomous sales platform that auto-engages your warmest leads.
summary.zh: Warmly 是一個自主銷售平台，能自動接觸最有意願的潛在客戶。

highlight.en: Warmly identifies website visitors and intent signals, then auto-follows up via chat, email, or LinkedIn, claiming 100+ paying customers and far more outbound than a human SDR.
highlight.zh: Warmly 辨識網站訪客與意向訊號，再透過聊天、電子郵件或 LinkedIn 自動跟進，宣稱擁有逾 100 家付費客戶，外撥量遠勝人工業務開發代表。

summary.en: Heron Data automates document-heavy workflows in financial services using AI and LLMs.
summary.zh: Heron Data 運用 AI 與大型語言模型，自動化金融服務中大量文件的工作流程。

highlight.en: Heron's software handles emails, analyzes attachments, and takes actions like updating CRMs, serving clients from small companies to FDIC-insured banks in small business finance and commercial insurance.
highlight.zh: Heron 的軟體處理電子郵件、分析附件並執行如更新 CRM 等動作，客戶涵蓋小型公司到 FDIC 承保銀行，遍及小型企業融資與商業保險領域。

summary.en: Osmind is a platform for advancing breakthrough mental health research and treatment.
summary.zh: Osmind 是推動突破性心理健康研究與治療的平台。

highlight.en: Osmind provides the only EHR built for interventional psychiatry clinics, covering TMS, ketamine, SPRAVATO, psychedelic medicine, and electroconvulsive therapy.
highlight.zh: Osmind 提供唯一專為介入式精神科診所打造的電子病歷系統，涵蓋經顱磁刺激、氯胺酮、SPRAVATO、迷幻藥治療與電痙攣療法。

summary.en: BIK is an agentic AI CRM for ecommerce marketing and support.
summary.zh: BIK 是一個面向電商行銷與客服的代理式 AI CRM。

highlight.en: BIK lets ecommerce businesses spin up commerce agents and build automation across the full funnel of acquisition, retention, and support in one place.
highlight.zh: BIK 讓電商業者在單一平台建立商務代理，並橫跨獲客、留存與客服的完整漏斗打造自動化流程。

summary.en: Arketa is an all-in-one platform for running a fitness or wellness business.
summary.zh: Arketa 是經營健身或健康事業的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Arketa supports online and in-person classes, video on-demand, courses, and website hosting in a single platform for fitness and wellness businesses.
highlight.zh: Arketa 在單一平台上支援線上與實體課程、隨選影片、課程教學及網站代管，服務健身與健康事業。

summary.en: Afriex offers instant, low-fee remittances for immigrants sending money home.
summary.zh: Afriex 為移民提供即時、低手續費的匯款服務，方便他們匯錢回家鄉。

highlight.en: Afriex enables instant, low-fee money transfers to over 25 countries, making it easy for immigrants to send money home.
highlight.zh: Afriex 可即時、低手續費地將款項匯往逾 25 個國家，讓移民輕鬆匯錢回家鄉。

summary.en: MedPiper provides parametric travel insurance with instant payouts for delayed flights.
summary.zh: MedPiper 提供參數型旅遊保險，航班延誤時可即時理賠。

highlight.en: OrbitCover by MedPiper powers flight delay coverage that auto-settles payouts in under five minutes with zero claims filing.
highlight.zh: MedPiper 的 OrbitCover 提供航班延誤保障，可在五分鐘內自動完成理賠且無需申請流程。

summary.en: Recurrency is an automated ERP platform for distributors.
summary.zh: Recurrency 是面向分銷商的自動化 ERP 平台。

highlight.en: Recurrency layers fast automation like intelligent sales recommendations, dynamic pricing, and demand forecasting onto legacy ERP systems, deployable in as little as one day.
highlight.zh: Recurrency 在傳統 ERP 系統之上疊加快速自動化功能，如智慧銷售建議、動態定價與需求預測，最快一天即可部署上線。

summary.en: Mesh is a performance management platform built for the way teams actually work.
summary.zh: Mesh 是一個貼合團隊實際工作方式的績效管理平台。

highlight.en: Mesh helps employees hit goals and get timely feedback, especially in remote teams, using a Facebook-like interface where people like and comment on each other's progress instead of filling out HR forms.
highlight.zh: Mesh 協助員工達成目標並即時獲得回饋，特別適合遠端團隊；其類似 Facebook 的介面讓同事為彼此的進度按讚與留言，取代填寫枯燥的人資表單。

summary.en: WareIQ offers Amazon Prime-like logistics for ecommerce companies in India.
summary.zh: WareIQ 為印度電商公司提供類似 Amazon Prime 的物流服務。

highlight.en: WareIQ combines an on-demand fulfillment network with software whose Decision Engine routes each order to the nearest warehouse and best courier for pickup and delivery.
highlight.zh: WareIQ 結合隨選履約網路與軟體，其決策引擎會將每筆訂單分配至最近的倉庫與最佳快遞，完成取貨與配送。

summary.en: Flint helps hospitals hire nurses from around the world.
summary.zh: Flint 協助醫院招募來自世界各地的護理人員。

highlight.en: Flint uses technology to simplify the complexity of immigration and licensing so hospitals can recruit nurses internationally.
highlight.zh: Flint 運用技術簡化移民與執照認證的繁瑣流程，讓醫院得以在國際間招募護理人員。

summary.en: Draftwise is contract drafting, review, and negotiation AI built for lawyers.
summary.zh: Draftwise 是專為律師打造的合約起草、審閱與協商 AI。

highlight.en: Draftwise draws on a firm's own knowledge base of past deals, preferred language, and internal guidance to streamline the entire contract workflow from first draft to signed deal.
highlight.zh: Draftwise 運用律所自身的知識庫，包含過往交易、慣用條款與內部指引，簡化從初稿到簽約的整個合約流程。

summary.en: Fancy was a UK on-demand grocery service delivering essentials in 30 minutes (acquired by Gopuff).
summary.zh: Fancy 是英國的隨選雜貨配送服務，30 分鐘內送達日常用品（已被 Gopuff 收購）。

highlight.en: Fancy delivered snacks, drinks, and more in under 30 minutes in the UK before being acquired by Gopuff.
highlight.zh: Fancy 在英國以不到 30 分鐘的速度配送零食、飲料等商品，後被 Gopuff 收購。

summary.en: Notabene is the trust and compliance layer for global crypto money movement.
summary.zh: Notabene 是全球加密貨幣資金流動的信任與合規層。

highlight.en: Notabene is a SaaS platform, likened to a SWIFT network for crypto, that lets businesses run counterparty due diligence and meet strict new global crypto transaction regulations.
highlight.zh: Notabene 是一個被比喻為加密貨幣版 SWIFT 網路的 SaaS 平台，讓企業對交易對手進行盡職調查，並符合嚴格的全球加密貨幣交易新規。

summary.en: doola is a Business-in-a-Box for forming and running LLCs.
summary.zh: doola 是一站式的「盒裝公司」服務，協助創立與營運有限責任公司。

highlight.en: doola handles everything creators need to form an LLC, open a bank account, accept payments, and manage ongoing compliance and tax filings, with users on every continent.
highlight.zh: doola 為創作者處理創立有限責任公司、開設銀行帳戶、收款及持續合規與報稅等所有事務，使用者遍布各大洲。

summary.en: Farmako Healthcare is India's fastest medicine delivery service, arriving in 30 minutes.
summary.zh: Farmako Healthcare 是印度最快的藥品配送服務，30 分鐘內送達。

highlight.en: Farmako also offers APIs and SDKs so any doctor, teleconsultation app, or EMR provider can run a virtual pharmacy without a license, fleet, or storefront, with 80+ B2B partners.
highlight.zh: Farmako 還提供 API 與 SDK，讓任何醫師、遠距看診應用或電子病歷供應商無需執照、車隊或店面即可經營虛擬藥局，目前擁有逾 80 家 B2B 合作夥伴。

summary.en: Parrot Software is an operating system for restaurants in Latin America.
summary.zh: Parrot Software 是拉丁美洲餐廳的營運作業系統。

highlight.en: Parrot unifies payment terminals, delivery apps, and invoicing into one POS, backed by a cloud-based restaurant management system, to turn operational chaos into control.
highlight.zh: Parrot 將支付終端、外送平台與發票整合為單一 POS 系統，並以雲端餐廳管理系統為後盾，將營運混亂轉化為可控狀態。

summary.en: Quell was an immersive fitness game played by fighting through a fantasy world.
summary.zh: Quell 是一款沉浸式健身遊戲，玩家在奇幻世界中戰鬥同時健身。

highlight.en: Quell used a low-cost wearable with smart resistance bands to guide players through a combat workout at home, positioned as Peloton meets gaming at a tenth of the price.
highlight.zh: Quell 運用搭配智慧阻力帶的平價穿戴裝置，引導玩家在家進行戰鬥健身，定位為「Peloton 結合遊戲」且價格僅為十分之一。

summary.en: MilkRun delivered locally sourced farm food directly to customers' doors.
summary.zh: MilkRun 將在地農場食材直接配送到顧客家門口。

highlight.en: MilkRun's farmers and chefs curated weekly boxes of seasonal produce, pasture-raised meat, and organic eggs and dairy, delivered with recipe suggestions and cooking videos.
highlight.zh: MilkRun 由農夫與廚師精選每週禮盒，內含當季蔬果、牧場放養肉品及有機蛋與乳製品，配送時還附上食譜建議與烹飪影片。

summary.en: Command AI is an AI-powered user assistance platform for software products (acquired).
summary.zh: Command AI 是面向軟體產品的 AI 使用者協助平台（已被收購）。

highlight.en: Command AI pairs an AI chat agent that answers questions and co-browses with a Nudge Platform that delivers behavior-based hints to guide users without annoying them.
highlight.zh: Command AI 結合可回答問題並共同瀏覽的 AI 聊天代理，以及根據使用者行為提供提示的 Nudge 平台，在不打擾使用者的前提下引導他們。

summary.en: Dripos is the all-in-one software a coffee shop needs to operate.
summary.zh: Dripos 是咖啡店營運所需的一站式軟體。

highlight.en: Dripos offers point of sale, employee scheduling, mobile ordering, and more, targeting the 100,000 cafes in the United States.
highlight.zh: Dripos 提供 POS、員工排班、行動點餐等功能，鎖定美國的 10 萬家咖啡店。

summary.en: Oico was a B2B marketplace for buying construction materials in Brazil.
summary.zh: Oico 是巴西的建材採購 B2B 市集。

highlight.en: Oico replaced the time-consuming task of managing orders, deliveries, and payments across dozens of suppliers with a single one-stop solution for large contractors.
highlight.zh: Oico 以單一的一站式解決方案，取代了大型承包商在數十家供應商間管理訂單、配送與付款的繁瑣工作。

summary.en: Future Fields makes hard-to-produce proteins using advanced biomanufacturing.
summary.zh: Future Fields 運用先進的生物製造技術生產難以製造的蛋白質。

highlight.en: Future Fields built what it calls the world's first multicellular advanced biomanufacturing platform to produce the most challenging recombinant proteins for biotech, life sciences, and pharma.
highlight.zh: Future Fields 打造其自稱全球首個多細胞先進生物製造平台，為生技、生命科學與製藥業生產最具挑戰性的重組蛋白。

summary.en: Zitara builds predictive battery management software for electrified fleets.
summary.zh: Zitara 為電動車隊打造預測性電池管理軟體。

highlight.en: Zitara's software helps companies deeply understand their batteries in both design and deployment, enabling safer, lower-cost, lower-waste energy storage.
highlight.zh: Zitara 的軟體協助企業在設計與部署階段深入了解電池，實現更安全、更低成本且更少浪費的能源儲存。

summary.en: Depict provides GPT-powered search and merchandising for fashion e-commerce.
summary.zh: Depict 為時尚電商提供 GPT 驅動的搜尋與商品陳列功能。

highlight.en: Depict brings AI-driven search and merchandising specifically to fashion e-commerce stores.
highlight.zh: Depict 將 AI 驅動的搜尋與商品陳列功能專門帶給時尚電商商店。

summary.en: Luminai automates repetitive manual work within mission-critical business processes.
summary.zh: Luminai 自動化關鍵業務流程中重複性的人工作業。

highlight.en: Luminai serves customers across insurance, healthcare, and financial services to remove repetitive manual steps from their most important business processes.
highlight.zh: Luminai 服務保險、醫療與金融服務領域的客戶，協助他們從最重要的業務流程中移除重複的人工步驟。

summary.en: Datafold uses agentic AI to automate manual data engineering tasks.
summary.zh: Datafold 運用代理式 AI 自動化人工的資料工程任務。

highlight.en: Datafold automates both daily tasks like testing and code reviews and large one-off projects like data platform migrations, with users from Perplexity to Disney.
highlight.zh: Datafold 既自動化測試與程式碼審查等日常任務，也處理資料平台遷移等大型一次性專案，客戶涵蓋 Perplexity 到 Disney。

summary.en: QuestDB is a high-performance open-source time series database.
summary.zh: QuestDB 是一款高效能的開源時序資料庫。

highlight.en: QuestDB runs close to the hardware to eliminate ingestion bottlenecks, with native Parquet, Iceberg, and SQL support, powering capital markets, crypto, space, energy, and robotics.
highlight.zh: QuestDB 貼近硬體運作以消除資料寫入瓶頸，原生支援 Parquet、Iceberg 與 SQL，為資本市場、加密貨幣、太空、能源與機器人領域提供動力。

summary.en: Byte was an on-demand food delivery service from dark kitchens in Pakistan.
summary.zh: Byte 是巴基斯坦以暗廚為基礎的隨選餐點外送服務。

highlight.en: Byte delivered food on demand from its own dark kitchens in Pakistan.
highlight.zh: Byte 在巴基斯坦透過自營暗廚提供隨選餐點外送。

summary.en: Atmos brought the entire homebuilding process online.
summary.zh: Atmos 將整個建房流程搬到線上。

highlight.en: Atmos let customers manage the entire homebuilding process online rather than through traditional offline workflows.
highlight.zh: Atmos 讓顧客在線上管理整個建房流程，而非透過傳統的線下作業方式。

summary.en: Altro lets people build credit using their existing subscriptions.
summary.zh: Altro 讓人們運用既有的訂閱服務建立信用紀錄。

highlight.en: Altro provides a $75 line of credit that works only on subscriptions members already pay for, like Netflix or Hulu, to help underserved users build their credit score.
highlight.zh: Altro 提供 75 美元的信用額度，僅可用於會員既有的訂閱服務（如 Netflix 或 Hulu），協助過去被忽視的使用者建立信用分數。

summary.en: Plerk offered fintech-based flexible benefits and perks for employees (acquired by Minu.mx).
summary.zh: Plerk 提供以金融科技為基礎的員工彈性福利與津貼（已被 Minu.mx 收購）。

highlight.en: Plerk gives local and remote teams a virtual card for flexible perks, letting companies set budgets and programs while employees choose the merchant, all on one bill.
highlight.zh: Plerk 為本地與遠端團隊提供彈性津貼虛擬卡，讓公司設定預算與方案、員工自選商家，並彙整為單一帳單。

summary.en: Blue Onion is a financial data layer for AI-powered finance and accounting.
summary.zh: Blue Onion 是面向 AI 財務與會計的金融資料層。

highlight.en: Blue Onion is a subledger platform that transforms messy, scattered transactions into clean, reconciled, automation-ready data for AI-powered finance teams.
highlight.zh: Blue Onion 是一個輔助分類帳平台，將雜亂分散的交易轉化為乾淨、已對帳且可自動化的資料，供 AI 財務團隊使用。

summary.en: Glimpse is an AI system of action for CPG retail operations.
summary.zh: Glimpse 是面向消費品零售營運的 AI 行動系統。

highlight.en: Glimpse's agents automate deductions management, revenue recovery, and cash application; one agent reviewed 17,000 deductions in under 24 hours, identifying $10M+ in revenue for a $1B CPG.
highlight.zh: Glimpse 的代理自動化扣款管理、營收回收與現金沖銷；其中一個代理在 24 小時內審查了 17,000 筆扣款，為一家年營收 10 億美元的消費品公司找出逾 1,000 萬美元的營收。

summary.en: Seam provides an API for connecting and controlling IoT devices.
summary.zh: Seam 提供連接與控制物聯網裝置的 API。

highlight.en: Seam lets developers connect and control third-party devices like door locks and thermostats through a single API.
highlight.zh: Seam 讓開發者透過單一 API 連接並控制門鎖、恆溫器等第三方裝置。

summary.en: Jeevam Health offered digital holistic care for complex chronic conditions.
summary.zh: Jeevam Health 為複雜的慢性病提供數位整體照護。

highlight.en: Jeevam's software helped doctors diagnose root causes of thyroid dysfunction and recommend protocols built around nutrition, supplements, lifestyle changes, and medicine.
highlight.zh: Jeevam 的軟體協助醫師診斷甲狀腺功能異常的根本原因，並推薦以營養、補充品、生活型態調整與藥物為核心的治療方案。

summary.en: Explorex is an ecosystem platform powering restaurants and diners in India.
summary.zh: Explorex 是串連印度餐廳與用餐者的生態系平台。

highlight.en: Explorex connects a full-stack restaurant OS (Bridge) with a consumer app (Elite) that shows live table availability, dynamic menus, and self-checkout to remove friction from dining out.
highlight.zh: Explorex 將全端餐廳作業系統（Bridge）與消費者應用（Elite）相連，後者提供即時桌位狀況、動態菜單與自助結帳，消除外出用餐的摩擦。

summary.en: Atomic offers an API that lets companies embed investment accounts into their services.
summary.zh: Atomic 提供 API，讓企業將投資帳戶嵌入自家服務。

highlight.en: With Atomic's API, any company that holds consumer deposits, such as savings apps, can embed professionally managed investment accounts into their products.
highlight.zh: 透過 Atomic 的 API，任何持有消費者存款的公司（如儲蓄應用）都能將專業管理的投資帳戶嵌入其產品。

summary.en: Hellosaurus is an interactive video platform for kids that lets them play, not just watch (acquired).
summary.zh: Hellosaurus 是一個兒童互動影片平台，讓孩子能參與遊玩而非只是觀看（已被收購）。

highlight.en: Hellosaurus gives kids media creators and YouTube stars tools to build participatory shows, turning passive screen time into active play that supports cognitive and social development.
highlight.zh: Hellosaurus 為兒童媒體創作者與 YouTube 明星提供工具製作可參與的節目，將被動的螢幕時間轉化為支持認知與社交發展的主動遊玩。

summary.en: Laylo is a CRM powering drops for iconic musicians and events.
summary.zh: Laylo 是為知名音樂人與活動驅動發行的 CRM。

highlight.en: Laylo combines landing pages, messaging, and link tracking to drive sales and streams around the biggest moments in entertainment.
highlight.zh: Laylo 結合登陸頁、訊息推播與連結追蹤，圍繞娛樂界的重大時刻帶動銷售與串流播放。

summary.en: Mozart Data is the easiest way to set up a modern data stack without engineering.
summary.zh: Mozart Data 是無需工程資源即可建立現代資料堆疊的最簡便方式。

highlight.en: Mozart Data provides an out-of-the-box data stack built on a best-in-class warehouse and ETL tool, spun up in hours so teams can focus on insights instead of data wrangling.
highlight.zh: Mozart Data 提供開箱即用的資料堆疊，建立在頂尖的資料倉儲與 ETL 工具之上，數小時即可啟用，讓團隊專注於洞察而非處理資料。

summary.en: Lightdash is an open-source alternative to Looker for business intelligence.
summary.zh: Lightdash 是 Looker 的開源替代方案，用於商業智慧分析。

highlight.en: Lightdash is built on top of dbt and lets teams centralize all their business logic in one place.
highlight.zh: Lightdash 建構於 dbt 之上，讓團隊將所有業務邏輯集中在單一處管理。

summary.en: Arist delivers effective learning at scale through messaging tools.
summary.zh: Arist 透過訊息工具大規模提供有效的學習體驗。

highlight.en: Arist is a message-based learning platform that trains employees via SMS, Slack, WhatsApp, and Microsoft Teams, serving over 10% of the Fortune 500 and governments.
highlight.zh: Arist 是一個以訊息為基礎的學習平台，透過簡訊、Slack、WhatsApp 與 Microsoft Teams 培訓員工，服務超過 10% 的財星 500 大企業與政府機構。

summary.en: Blissway provides prime tech infrastructure for the tolling industry.
summary.zh: Blissway 為收費道路產業提供核心技術基礎設施。

highlight.en: Blissway builds the technology infrastructure underpinning the tolling industry.
highlight.zh: Blissway 打造支撐收費道路產業運作的技術基礎設施。

summary.en: Seal is an all-in-one workspace for companies making regulated products.
summary.zh: Seal 是為生產受監管產品的企業打造的一站式工作空間。

highlight.en: Seal gives companies that make regulated products a single workspace to manage their work.
highlight.zh: Seal 為生產受監管產品的企業提供單一工作空間，統一管理相關作業。

summary.en: SockSoho is a technology-powered men's fashion brand, starting with socks.
summary.zh: SockSoho 是一個以技術驅動的男士時尚品牌，從襪子起步。

highlight.en: SockSoho is India's largest DTC sock brand, with the mission of building the next Uniqlo using socks as a starting point.
highlight.zh: SockSoho 是印度最大的直營襪子品牌，以襪子為起點，立志打造下一個 Uniqlo。

summary.en: Kernal Biologics creates mRNA 2.0 therapies that act on specific cells.
summary.zh: Kernal Biologics 研發能作用於特定細胞的 mRNA 2.0 療法。

highlight.en: Kernal's selective mRNA-LNP technology targets cancer and autoimmune disease; its KR-402 program achieves over 90% delivery efficiency with T-cell-targeted LNPs to program CAR-T inside the body.
highlight.zh: Kernal 的選擇性 mRNA-LNP 技術鎖定癌症與自體免疫疾病；其 KR-402 計畫運用標靶 T 細胞的 LNP，達到逾 90% 的遞送效率，可在體內直接編程 CAR-T。

summary.en: Swif.ai is a real-time device compliance and security platform for every endpoint.
summary.zh: Swif.ai 是一個即時的裝置合規與資安平台，涵蓋每一台終端裝置。

highlight.en: Swif.ai's lightweight agent enforces encryption, patching, and app controls across Mac, Windows, and Linux, auto-remediates drift, and streams audit evidence to tools like Vanta and Drata.
highlight.zh: Swif.ai 的輕量代理在 Mac、Windows 與 Linux 上強制執行加密、修補與應用程式控管，自動修正偏差，並將稽核證據串流至 Vanta、Drata 等工具。

summary.en: Daybreak Health is a digital mental health system built for youth.
summary.zh: Daybreak Health 是專為青少年打造的數位心理健康系統。

highlight.en: Daybreak partners with schools and pediatric groups to deliver teletherapy, psychiatry, and digital education, aiming for zero cost to families through insurance and government funding.
highlight.zh: Daybreak 與學校及小兒科團隊合作，提供遠距治療、精神科與數位衛教，並透過保險與政府經費力求對家庭零負擔。

summary.en: Nextera Robotics is an AI-native robotics and industrial automation company.
summary.zh: Nextera Robotics 是一家以 AI 為核心的機器人與工業自動化公司。

highlight.en: Nextera Robotics, founded at MIT, builds AI-native robotics and industrial automation systems.
highlight.zh: Nextera Robotics 創立於麻省理工學院，打造以 AI 為核心的機器人與工業自動化系統。

summary.en: Lendtable gives employees cash advances so they can capture their full 401(k) match and ESPP.
summary.zh: Lendtable 為員工提供現金預支，讓他們得以領取完整的 401(k) 雇主提撥與 ESPP。

highlight.en: Lendtable advances cash to cover living expenses so workers can finally earn their employer 401(k) match, then recoups its costs from the vested match, addressing 25 million workers leaving money on the table.
highlight.zh: Lendtable 預支現金以支應生活開銷，讓勞工終能領取雇主的 401(k) 提撥，再從既得的提撥金中回收成本，解決 2,500 萬名勞工放棄這筆免費收入的問題。

summary.en: Porter is the easiest way to deploy and scale applications on AWS, Azure, and GCP.
summary.zh: Porter 是在 AWS、Azure 與 GCP 上部署並擴展應用程式的最簡便方式。

highlight.en: Porter connects to your own cloud account and provisions the underlying infrastructure for you, handling building and autoscaling without DevOps overhead.
highlight.zh: Porter 連接你自己的雲端帳戶並為你佈建底層基礎設施，自動處理建置與自動擴展，免除 DevOps 負擔。

summary.en: twoplus fertility makes an effective home-use fertility treatment for natural conception.
summary.zh: twoplus fertility 推出有效的居家使用生育治療產品，協助自然受孕。

highlight.en: twoplus fertility's at-home treatment increases the likelihood of pregnancy by guiding more sperm toward the ovum, offering a less draining alternative to IVF and IUI.
highlight.zh: twoplus fertility 的居家治療透過引導更多精子游向卵子來提高受孕機率，成為比體外受精與人工授精更不耗費身心的替代方案。

summary.en: Current Foods makes plant-based seafood, billed as the 'Impossible Foods of seafood' (acquired).
summary.zh: Current Foods 製作植物性海鮮，被稱為「海鮮版的 Impossible Foods」（已被收購）。

highlight.en: Current Foods uses plants and biotechnology to create next-generation seafood, starting with raw tuna and smoked salmon, aiming to win on price and consistency without compromising taste or health.
highlight.zh: Current Foods 運用植物與生物技術打造新一代海鮮，首推生鮪魚與煙燻鮭魚，在不犧牲口感與健康的前提下力求在價格與一致性上勝出。

summary.en: Kingdom creates and sells functional Superculture ingredients that work.
summary.zh: Kingdom 研發並銷售真正有效的機能性 Superculture 原料。

highlight.en: Kingdom's Superculture postbiotic ingredients target root causes of unmet pet health needs, starting with Pet Oral and Pet Immune for industry-leading efficacy.
highlight.zh: Kingdom 的 Superculture 後生元原料針對寵物未被滿足健康需求的根本原因，首推 Pet Oral 與 Pet Immune，達到業界領先的功效。

summary.en: Akiflow brings all your tasks and calendars into one AI-powered productivity app.
summary.zh: Akiflow 將你所有的任務與行事曆整合進一個 AI 驅動的生產力應用。

highlight.en: Akiflow integrates tasks and calendars with an AI executive assistant in a single productivity app.
highlight.zh: Akiflow 在單一生產力應用中整合任務、行事曆與 AI 行政助理。

summary.en: VenoStent makes an absorbable wrap that goes around blood vessels during surgery.
summary.zh: VenoStent 製作可吸收的血管包覆材，於手術中環繞血管使用。

highlight.en: VenoStent addresses the half of the 10 million annual dialysis and bypass surgeries that fail, using a wrap placed around blood vessels so they don't fail.
highlight.zh: VenoStent 針對每年 1,000 萬例洗腎與繞道手術中失敗的那一半，運用環繞血管的包覆材防止血管失能。

summary.en: Known Medicine combines 3D cell culture and AI to translate drugs to clinical success (acquired).
summary.zh: Known Medicine 結合 3D 細胞培養與 AI，協助藥物邁向臨床成功（已被收購）。

highlight.en: Known Medicine breaks down patient tumors into thousands of micro-tumors and treats each with different drugs to determine which the patient will respond to best.
highlight.zh: Known Medicine 將病患腫瘤分解為數千個微型腫瘤，並以不同藥物分別處理，以判定病患對哪種藥物反應最佳。

summary.en: CarbonChain helps companies automate the accounting of their carbon emissions.
summary.zh: CarbonChain 協助企業自動化計算其碳排放。

highlight.en: CarbonChain's SaaS tool lets companies in highly polluting industries track supply chain carbon emissions to mitigate risks from carbon taxes and government penalties.
highlight.zh: CarbonChain 的 SaaS 工具讓高污染產業的公司追蹤供應鏈碳排放，以降低碳稅與政府罰則帶來的風險。

summary.en: Increase provides enterprise-grade banking APIs.
summary.zh: Increase 提供企業級的銀行 API。

highlight.en: Increase offers modern banking infrastructure that lets technology companies programmatically store, move, and reconcile money.
highlight.zh: Increase 提供現代化的銀行基礎設施，讓科技公司以程式化方式儲存、轉移與對帳資金。

summary.en: Novel is an international business bank account for global founders.
summary.zh: Novel 是為全球創辦人打造的國際企業銀行帳戶。

highlight.en: Novel lets international founders get a U.S. business bank account, multi-currency wallets, and global transfers in 140+ currencies, all in one place.
highlight.zh: Novel 讓國際創辦人在單一平台取得美國企業銀行帳戶、多幣別錢包，以及支援逾 140 種貨幣的全球轉帳。

summary.en: Hypotenuse AI is an AI-native operating system for enterprise ecommerce companies.
summary.zh: Hypotenuse AI 是面向企業電商公司的 AI 原生作業系統。

highlight.en: Fortune 500 ecommerce brands use Hypotenuse AI to enrich product data, edit images, and create high-quality product copy at scale, making teams 10x faster.
highlight.zh: 財星 500 大電商品牌運用 Hypotenuse AI 大規模豐富產品資料、編輯圖片並產出高品質產品文案，讓團隊效率提升 10 倍。

summary.en: Bits is a credit card designed to help people build credit.
summary.zh: Bits 是一張專為協助人們建立信用而設計的信用卡。

highlight.en: Bits offers a credit card built specifically to help people build their credit.
highlight.zh: Bits 提供一張專門用於協助人們建立信用紀錄的信用卡。

summary.en: TyltGO powers same-day delivery for retailers under their own brand.
summary.zh: TyltGO 為零售商提供以其自有品牌名義出貨的當日配送服務。

highlight.en: TyltGO gives brick-and-mortar retailers and e-commerce brands same-day delivery under their own brand name.
highlight.zh: TyltGO 讓實體零售商與電商品牌能以自有品牌名義提供當日配送。

summary.en: Gilgamesh Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage biotech focused on mental health treatments.
summary.zh: Gilgamesh Pharmaceuticals 是一家專注於心理健康治療的臨床階段生技公司。

highlight.en: Gilgamesh develops new chemical entities for mental health, combining medicinal chemistry, IP strategy, and neuroscience with a team experienced in biotech exits and inventions.
highlight.zh: Gilgamesh 研發心理健康新化學實體，結合藥物化學、智財策略與神經科學，團隊擁有生技公司退場與發明的豐富經驗。

summary.en: Finmark is financial planning software for startups (acquired).
summary.zh: Finmark 是為新創公司打造的財務規劃軟體（已被收購）。

highlight.en: Finmark makes it simple for startups to manage their runway, hiring, and cash.
highlight.zh: Finmark 讓新創公司輕鬆管理資金跑道、招聘與現金流。

summary.en: Humanloop is an LLM evaluations platform for enterprises (acquired).
summary.zh: Humanloop 是面向企業的大型語言模型評估平台（已被收購）。

highlight.en: Teams at Gusto, Vanta, and Duolingo use Humanloop to ship reliable AI products with best practices for prompt management, evaluation, and observability.
highlight.zh: Gusto、Vanta 與 Duolingo 的團隊運用 Humanloop 推出可靠的 AI 產品，並導入提示管理、評估與可觀測性的最佳實務。

summary.en: Tydo was a customer intelligence platform that turns data into insights without engineers.
summary.zh: Tydo 是一個顧客智慧平台，無需工程師即可將資料轉化為洞察。

highlight.en: Tydo's Customer Intelligence Platform was a complete data warehouse built for AI-powered customer insights with no engineer required.
highlight.zh: Tydo 的顧客智慧平台是一個完整的資料倉儲，專為 AI 驅動的顧客洞察打造，且無需工程師。

summary.en: Shuttle is a cloud infrastructure platform for building backends fast.
summary.zh: Shuttle 是一個讓你快速建構後端的雲端基礎設施平台。

highlight.en: Over 20,000 developers use Shuttle's zero-config platform to build and deploy Rust backends in minutes, now extending the same experience to those building with Cursor and GitHub Copilot.
highlight.zh: 超過 2 萬名開發者運用 Shuttle 的零設定平台，於數分鐘內建構並部署 Rust 後端，如今更將相同體驗延伸至使用 Cursor 與 GitHub Copilot 的開發者。

summary.en: Aquarium Learning helps ML teams improve models by improving their datasets (acquired).
summary.zh: Aquarium Learning 協助機器學習團隊透過改善資料集來提升模型表現（已被收購）。

highlight.en: Aquarium's tooling makes it easy for ML teams to find anomalies and failure patterns in datasets, then fix them by editing or adding the right data so retrained models improve.
highlight.zh: Aquarium 的工具讓機器學習團隊輕鬆找出資料集中的異常與失敗模式，再透過編輯或新增適當資料加以修正，使重新訓練的模型持續進步。

summary.en: Verifiable provides an API for healthcare compliance.
summary.zh: Verifiable 提供醫療合規的 API。

highlight.en: Verifiable offers an API focused on healthcare compliance.
highlight.zh: Verifiable 提供專注於醫療合規的 API。

summary.en: Hypermile is a driver co-pilot that makes trucking more efficient (acquired).
summary.zh: Hypermile 是讓貨運更具效率的駕駛輔助系統（已被收購）。

highlight.en: Hypermile's AI driver assistance system tackles fuel costs, which make up over a third of logistics operating costs and which driving behavior can raise by up to 35%.
highlight.zh: Hypermile 的 AI 駕駛輔助系統針對燃油成本，這項成本佔物流營運支出三分之一以上，而駕駛行為可使其增加多達 35%。

summary.en: Volopay is a corporate card and spend management platform, billed as 'Brex for Southeast Asia'.
summary.zh: Volopay 是一個企業卡與支出管理平台，被稱為「東南亞版的 Brex」。

highlight.en: Volopay eliminates expense reports and reimbursements, letting finance teams control approvals, make domestic and cross-border bill payments, manage cards, and reconcile accounting in one place.
highlight.zh: Volopay 免除費用報銷流程，讓財務團隊在單一平台控管核准、進行國內與跨境帳單付款、管理公司卡並完成會計對帳。

summary.en: CoreCare helps healthcare providers reduce administrative costs using AI.
summary.zh: CoreCare 運用 AI 協助醫療機構降低行政成本。

highlight.en: Trusted by 1,000+ locations, CoreCare's Collaborative Revenue Management unites data and teams for post-acute and long-term care providers to increase admissions and optimize reimbursement.
highlight.zh: CoreCare 獲逾 1,000 個據點採用，其協作式營收管理整合資料與團隊，協助後急性與長期照護機構提升收治量並優化給付。

summary.en: Awtomic is a subscription management and discovery platform, billed as 'Dollar Shave Club as a platform'.
summary.zh: Awtomic 是一個訂閱管理與探索平台，被稱為「平台化的 Dollar Shave Club」。

highlight.en: Awtomic starts as a Shopify app giving DTC merchants premium subscription power, then helps customers discover new brands via cross-sells and manage subscriptions in one place.
highlight.zh: Awtomic 以 Shopify 應用起步，賦予直營商家高階訂閱能力，再透過交叉銷售協助顧客探索新品牌並於單一處管理訂閱。

summary.en: AI.Fashion was an AI creative suite for the fashion industry.
summary.zh: AI.Fashion 是面向時尚產業的 AI 創意工具組。

highlight.en: AI.Fashion let brands create physically accurate digital versions of unreleased clothing before production to reduce waste, and photorealistic imagery on multiple sizes for marketing.
highlight.zh: AI.Fashion 讓品牌在生產前製作未上市服裝的擬真數位版本以減少浪費，並產出多種尺碼的擬真照片用於行銷。

summary.en: SuperTokens is an open-source alternative to Auth0, AWS Cognito, and Firebase Auth.
summary.zh: SuperTokens 是 Auth0、AWS Cognito 與 Firebase Auth 的開源替代方案。

highlight.en: SuperTokens takes a modular approach so developers pick only the features they need, can own and manage user data, and run it on-premise for free or use a hosted tier.
highlight.zh: SuperTokens 採模組化設計，讓開發者只挑選所需功能，可自行掌控與管理使用者資料，並能免費自架或使用代管方案。

summary.en: Mailwarm helps senders reach the inbox and avoid spam folders.
summary.zh: Mailwarm 協助寄件者進入收件匣並避免落入垃圾郵件夾。

highlight.en: Mailwarm builds sender reputation through real inbox interactions across a large mailbox network, complemented by deliverability diagnostics via MCP, API, or web and an autopilot service.
highlight.zh: Mailwarm 透過大型信箱網路中真實的收件匣互動建立寄件者信譽，並輔以可經 MCP、API 或網頁使用的送達率診斷工具及自動化服務。

summary.en: Formal helps companies take control of their data in real time.
summary.zh: Formal 協助企業即時掌控自家資料。

highlight.en: Formal gives companies real-time control over their data.
highlight.zh: Formal 讓企業能即時掌控自家資料。

summary.en: Artifact made personal podcasts capturing stories with the people in your life.
summary.zh: Artifact 製作個人 Podcast，記錄你與生命中重要之人的故事。

highlight.en: Artifact paired people with professional interviewers through a marketplace, handling scheduling and polished editing, then hosted the stories in shareable interactive listening experiences.
highlight.zh: Artifact 透過市集為使用者媒合專業訪談者，包辦排程與精緻剪輯，再將故事託管於可分享的互動聆聽體驗中。

summary.en: Charityvest is a modern donor-advised fund for individuals and corporations (acquired).
summary.zh: Charityvest 是面向個人與企業的現代化捐贈者建議基金（已被收購）。

highlight.en: Charityvest lets donors make tax-smart contributions of cash, stock, crypto, and equity, invest the balance in low-cost ETFs, and grant to 1.4 million charities with one tax receipt.
highlight.zh: Charityvest 讓捐贈者以節稅方式捐出現金、股票、加密貨幣與股權，將餘額投資於低成本 ETF，並可向 140 萬家慈善機構撥款，全年僅需一張稅務收據。

summary.en: TANGObuilder automated the work of structural engineers.
summary.zh: TANGObuilder 自動化結構工程師的工作。

highlight.en: TANGObuilder generates a building's structural design in real time, cutting roughly six weeks from the process and reducing material usage by 30%.
highlight.zh: TANGObuilder 即時生成建築的結構設計，從流程中省下約六週時間，並減少 30% 的材料用量。

summary.en: Streamdal was a data quality and playback platform for streaming systems.
summary.zh: Streamdal 是面向串流系統的資料品質與回放平台。

highlight.en: Streamdal was a SaaS data platform for observing, repairing, and replaying data in streaming systems.
highlight.zh: Streamdal 是一個 SaaS 資料平台，用於在串流系統中觀測、修復與回放資料。
